changes: Settings: Check for Updates now streams output in real time so you can see each step
Settings: fixed Update Available banner never showing (UPDATE_AVAILABLE signal was missing from script)
Check-Updates: added 20-second timeout on GitHub version check — fails clearly instead of hanging
Import-FlyMappings: DNS pre-check logs whether API hostname resolves before connecting
Import-FlyMappings: BOM-aware CSV encoding detection (handles UTF-8, UTF-16, ANSI)
Import-FlyMappings: smarter source/destination column detection (prefers email/URL columns over plain name columns)
Added Check-OneDriveStatus.ps1, Get-UserMailboxLicenses.ps1, Set-DestinationLicenses.ps1
Added show-save-dialog IPC handler for native file save dialogs
Connections: added Stop Jobs button (red, right-aligned next to Clear) to stop in-progress Fly migration jobs
Added Stop-FlyMigrationStage.ps1 — calls Fly REST API DELETE to stop running jobs per workload
Discovery: default output folder changed to E:\Work\Jolera\Volaris\Discovery
Discovery: domain field replaced with searchable combobox — click ▾ or type to filter by domain or VBU name
Discovery: now runs search-domain.ps1 directly in the Electron UI (no separate window)
Discovery: domain list populated from VBU ID CSV; VBU ID auto-fills on selection
Discovery: Graph authentication falls back to device-code flow when WAM/HWND unavailable (fixes 0-users issue)
Discovery: output folder Browse now opens a folder picker; path is also editable
Discovery: -OutputPath parameter added to search-domain.ps1
Settings: added VBU CSV path field in Discovery tab
Fix: Save Settings no longer fails with JSON parse error on BOM-prefixed config.json (PS 5.1 compat)
Fix: settings.ps1 now writes config.json without UTF-8 BOM
Added Fix-ConfigBOM.ps1 — cleanup script for servers with existing BOM-prefixed config.json
Added Install-Prerequisites.bat + Install-Prerequisites.ps1 for one-step server setup
Added New-SharePointSites.ps1: creates missing destination SharePoint sites from a mapping CSV
Connections view: new 'Create Sites' button runs site creation before Verify (SharePoint only)
Connections view: added 'SharePoint site owner' email input for destination tenant admin UPN
Sites are created as modern team sites (STS#3 template) using Microsoft.Online.SharePoint.PowerShell
Fixed Import-FlyMappings: bypassed Fly.Client module's broken project lookup entirely
Root cause: Fly API search returns no results for names containing ' - ' (e.g. 'Pcentra - Exchange')
Fix: now searches with customer prefix only ('Pcentra'), finds project by exact name, posts mappings via REST API directly
Supports all workloads: Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, TeamChat, Groups
Added Deduplicate Inventory script to Misc Scripts (classifies Teams, Groups, SharePoint from discovery workbook)
Fixed Import-FlyMappings: removed unreliable project pre-check that blocked valid imports
Fixed Import-FlyMappings: NaN response from Fly API now correctly reported as a failure with diagnostics
Fixed Import-FlyMappings: CSV always normalised to UTF-8 BOM before passing to Fly.Client
Fixed Import-FlyMappings: source file encoding auto-detected from BOM (handles UTF-8, UTF-16, ANSI)
Fixed Import-FlyMappings: duplicate/same-row detection uses OrdinalIgnoreCase for non-ASCII characters
Fixed Import-FlyMappings: CSV column names and detected source/destination columns now logged
Fixed Start-FlyMigrationStage: removed hanging Get-FlyMigrationProject fallback scan
Fixed runner.ps1: removed invalid -Top parameter from Get-FlyMigrationProject call
Deduplicate Inventory: hardcoded SharePoint Admin URL to ourvolaris-admin.sharepoint.com
Log panels: added max-height cap so output scrolls instead of growing off-screen
Node.js: installed as portable (no admin required) with user PATH registration
Project monitor rows now open directly in Fly portal at the correct project URL
Fixed Fly portal URL construction to use /#/project/{id}/mappings format
Get-MigrationData: FailedItems and WarningItems now correctly populated from API
Get-MigrationData: ProjectId now included in workload summary for portal links
Start-FlyMigrationStage: skips workloads with no mappings imported
Start-FlyMigrationStage: handles already-in-progress mappings gracefully without error noise
Fixed open-logs button to open correct log directory (%APPDATA%\FlyMigration\Logs)
Fixed silent error in project monitor click handler (undeclared _cachedPortalUrl)
Improved error logging in Get-MigrationData (Write-Verbose -> Write-Warning)
Added Progress by Workload section with 4 workload cards
Shows progress for Exchange Online, OneDrive, SharePoint, and Teams
Visual progress bars with current/total counts
Added sidebar navigation to web edition
Web app now has Dashboard, Discovery, AvePoint Fly, Misc Scripts, Domain Removal quick links
Disabled DevTools auto-open in web app (Ctrl+Shift+I still works)
All menus now open maximized but remain resizable
Improved stat card labels - now show above values for clarity
Made stat labels uppercase and bold
Changed status text to muted color for better visual hierarchy
Stats now clearly indicate what each number represents
Redesigned main launcher as at-a-glance dashboard with live stats
Added 4 stat cards at top: Active Projects, Users Migrated, Success Rate, Total Data
Reorganized main menu tiles into 3-column grid layout
Enlarged main launcher to 1000x700px for better dashboard visibility
Added Quick Actions section header
Updated footer with version display
Moved dashboard stats from AvePoint Fly to main launcher
Redesigned AvePoint Fly menu as at-a-glance dashboard with live stats
Added 4 stat cards: Active Projects, Users Migrated, Success Rate, Total Data
Reorganized action cards into 3x2 grid layout
Added rounded corners to Discovery menu cards
Added smooth hover animations to all cards
Enlarged dashboard to 1000x700px for better visibility
Added Documentation quick action card
Refined UI to match official design system specifications
Standardized all colors to design system palette
Unified font definitions across all windows and dialogs
Improved dark grid styling in Project Monitor
Added complete color token library to lib.ps1
Rebranded from 'VG Migration Tools' to 'Migration Toolkit'
Updated all UI elements to use new branding
Updated documentation to reflect new product name
Added visual progress feedback during update installation
Improved auto-update visibility with notification banner
Update check now shows yellow banner when updates available
Added one-click 'Install Update' button to notification
Removed 'Update Cloud UPNs' from Domain Removal menu
Updated New-Package.ps1 to include all new domain removal files
Added version.json and Check-Updates.ps1 to package
Package now includes complete auto-update system
Added 'Check for Updates' button in Settings > Config tab
Removed 'Remove Devices' from Domain Removal menu
Added Domain-Removal-Workflow.ps1 - 3-step guided workflow
Added Update-OnPremUPN.ps1 for on-premise Active Directory

Added account preview list to Hide-AddressBook
Integrated Azure AD Sync functionality (VOL-ane-aad1)
Split Domain Removal menu: Workflow + individual tools
Hardcoded target domain to @ourvolaris.onmicrosoft.com
Added Update-UPN.ps1 with checkbox selection

Fixed column sorting in Update-UPN
